**What this changes**
A short description, and the pattern folder it touches.

**Checklist**

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pyright` reports no errors
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (offline, no API key)
- [ ] Any new demo runs with `python3 -m patterns.<name>.main` and exits 0
- [ ] A research-backed module cites its source, verified against the primary page
- [ ] Prose carries no em-dashes and avoids the banned-vocab list
- [ ] The folder README is updated if the variant list changed
